notes: Ranked & Casual matchmaking (Bug Testing Season, in dev): jump into a queue, get paired by skill with a League-style ready check, and climb the Bounty ladder. Adds a Most Wanted leaderboard, a reworked profile (real bounty/tier, game-type tags on recent matches you can click into, and Deck History split by Casual/Ranked), and Match History decklists now show a card preview on hover with a Save Deck button to copy a list into your decks.
